_help: Add 30–50 questions across 'definition', 'comparison', 'multi-hop', 'follow-up', 'unknown'. Either expectedConceptIds (stable) or expectedConceptTitles (easier to author) is required for hit@k / MRR. Keywords are optional but free wins. Items without any expectations only contribute latency stats. See lib/eval/metrics.ts for the schema.

items.question: 什么是 LLM Wiki 这个概念？
RAG 和 GraphRAG 有什么区别？
那它和普通的相比有什么优势？

history.text: GraphRAG 是把知识组织成图谱再做检索的 RAG 变体。
